2605.13729.title: Coordinating Multiple Conditions for Trajectory-Controlled Human Motion Generation
2605.13729.paper_summary: Trajectory-controlled human motion generation aims to synthesize realistic human motions conditioned on both textual descriptions and spatial trajectories. However, existing methods suffer from two critical limitations: first, the conflict between text and trajectory conditions disrupts the denoising process, resulting in compromised motion quality or inaccurate trajectory following; second, the use of redundant motion representations introduces inconsistencies between motion components, leading to instability during trajectory control. To address these challenges, we propose CMC, a decoupled framework that effectively coordinates text and trajectory conditions through a divide-and-conquer strategy. CMC follows a divide-and-conquer paradigm, comprising two cascaded stages: Trajectory Control and Motion Completion. In the first stage, a diffusion model generates a simplified representation of the controlled joints under trajectory guidance, based on the given trajectories, ensuring accurate and stable trajectory following. In the second stage, a text-conditioned diffusion inpainting model generates full-body motions using the simplified representation from the first stage as partial observations. To mitigate overfitting caused by limited inpainting training data, we further introduce the Selective Inpainting Mechanism (SIM), which alternates between text-to-motion generation and motion inpainting tasks during training. Experiments on HumanML3D and KIT datasets demonstrate that CMC achieves state-of-the-art performance in control accuracy and motion quality, demonstrating its effectiveness in coordinating multimodal conditions and representations.
2605.13729.paper_summary_zh: 軌跡控制的人類動作生成旨在合成基於文本描述和空間軌跡的真實人類動作。<lb/>然而，現有的方法面臨兩個關鍵限制：首先，文本和軌跡條件之間的衝突擾亂了去噪過程，導致動作質量下降或軌跡跟隨不準確；其次，冗餘的動作表示引入了動作組件之間的不一致，導致在軌跡控制過程中的不穩定性。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了CMC，一個通過分而治之策略有效協調文本和軌跡條件的解耦框架。<lb/>CMC遵循分而治之的範式，包括兩個級聯階段：軌跡控制和動作完成。<lb/>在第一階段，擴散模型根據給定的軌跡生成受軌跡指導的受控關節的簡化表示，確保準確和穩定的軌跡跟隨。<lb/>在第二階段，基於文本的擴散修補模型使用第一階段的簡化表示作為部分觀察生成全身動作。<lb/>為了減輕由於有限的修補訓練數據造成的過擬合，我們進一步引入了選擇性修補機制（SIM），在訓練過程中交替進行文本到動作生成和動作修補任務。<lb/>在HumanML3D和KIT數據集上的實驗表明，CMC在控制精度和動作質量方面達到了最先進的性能，展示了其在協調多模態條件和表示方面的有效性。
2605.13729.author: Deli Cai et.al.
2605.13729.authors: Deli Cai, Haoyang Ma, Changxing Ding
